action.reasoning: Observation: PairMPNN h192/l4 trained for 20 epochs is the best so far with test MAE 0.1145 and val MAE 0.1154, while the v2 receiver-conditioned variant was worse. Analysis: the original architecture benefits strongly from more training and is likely still improving; with ~91 minutes remaining, a 40-epoch run is affordable after the required baseline/eval cycle. Decision: train the current best PairMPNN configuration longer from scratch for 40 epochs and submit the best-validation checkpoint to test whether additional optimization reduces MAE further.
